summary: Iteration 27: All 4 features PASS for Prosthodontics mobile app. Step Wizard UI, Loading Type Container border, Implant Planning on procedure detail page, and standalone Implant Selection tab all working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for procedures without photos - this is expected behavior but logs console error

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features from the current request are working correctly. The app restart cleared any stale cache issues.

feature_1_step_wizard_ui.description: Step indicator bar visible with '1 Case Details' (blue active pill) and '2 Implant Selection' (grey inactive pill) connected by a line

feature_2_loading_type_container.description: Loading type chips (Immediate Loading, Delayed Loading) are inside a bordered container with visible border

feature_3_implant_planning_detail_page.description: CaseImplantPlanning visible on procedure detail page for pending_phase1 with blue Phase 1 banner

evidence.banner_text: Phase 1 Required: Complete Implant Planning Below

feature_4_implant_selection_tab.description: Standalone Implant Selection tab accessible from bottom navigation with full functionality
